# The House of Scale

> Performance marketing agency in Dubai and the UAE. We turn ad spend into revenue with Google Ads, Meta and TikTok campaigns measured by qualified leads, ROAS and profit. Founder-led, no long-term contracts, transparent weekly reporting. Management plans from AED 3,999 per month; ad spend is always billed directly to the client by the platforms.

Contact: contact@thehouseofscale.com | WhatsApp/Call: +971 58 698 1912 | Dubai, United Arab Emirates

## Services
- [Services and Pricing](https://www.thehouseofscale.com/services): All services and monthly packages (Launch AED 3,999, Growth AED 6,999, Scale AED 11,999, Enterprise custom)
- [Google Ads Agency in Dubai](https://www.thehouseofscale.com/services/google-ads-dubai): Search, Performance Max and remarketing measured by qualified leads
- [Meta and Facebook Ads Agency in Dubai](https://www.thehouseofscale.com/services/meta-ads-dubai): Facebook and Instagram campaigns, creative testing, retargeting
- [Lead Generation Company in Dubai](https://www.thehouseofscale.com/services/lead-generation-dubai): Qualified, sales-ready leads delivered to WhatsApp and CRM
- [Landing Pages and Web Development](https://www.thehouseofscale.com/services/landing-pages-web-development-dubai): Conversion-focused, mobile-first pages with tracking built in

## Industries
- [Industries We Serve](https://www.thehouseofscale.com/industries): Real estate, finance, healthcare, automobile, education, business setup, mobile apps, entertainment, podcasts
- [Real Estate Lead Generation in Dubai](https://www.thehouseofscale.com/industries/real-estate-lead-generation-dubai): Qualified buyer and investor leads for brokers and developers
- [Business Setup Lead Generation in Dubai](https://www.thehouseofscale.com/industries/business-setup-lead-generation-dubai): Founder enquiries for company formation firms

## Company
- [About Us](https://www.thehouseofscale.com/about-us): Founded in 2026 by Kaushal Jha; senior work, honest numbers, no lock-ins
- [Contact Us](https://www.thehouseofscale.com/contact-us): Request a call back; reply within one business day
